Start with the .grid container: display: grid, grid-template-columns: repeat(columns, 1fr), and gap.
Generate base .col-{n} classes from 1 to columns, each with grid-column: span {n}.
Sort breakpoints by their pixel value (ascending) for mobile-first CSS.
For each breakpoint, wrap .col-{breakpoint}-{n} classes inside a @media (min-width: {value}px) block.
